summary: Project Alpha initialized in AI Factory

Delete button on ClassDetailScreen restricted to head_trainer role. Regular trainers retain View Participants and Edit. Delete prompt logic (recurring vs standalone) already existed and was kept intact.
Built ConfirmModal component. Replaced all Alert.alert calls across 5 screens. Error/success alerts converted to toast. Alert fully removed from codebase.

Resolved 6 of 8 Athena audit findings. Critical Firestore rules fixed (recurringClasses added, classes delete tightened to head_trainer). Auth failure now surfaces via toast. FAB shadow and micro-spacing use theme tokens. Tasks 006 (Firebase env vars) and 008 (tests) pending user clarification.
All 8 Athena audit findings resolved. Firebase credentials moved to .env. 32 tests passing across classService and dateUtils. Full audit scorecard: 0 open issues.
